S

separator - Variable in class cli.FlagRule
 
setDebug(boolean) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Enables or disables debugging mode.
setFlagHandled() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Sets a status indicating that this flag has been handled, including processing any associated arguments or values.
setFreeArgumentLimit(int) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Sets the maximum number of arguments (operands) permitted.
setSeparator(boolean) - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Records the presence of a value separator (=) detected during the lexical parsing of this specific flag instance.
ShortFlagHandler - Class in cli
Provides a concrete strategy for processing short-form flags based on POSIX conventions.
ShortFlagHandler() - Constructor for class cli.ShortFlagHandler
 
shortHandler - Variable in class cli.CommandFlagParser
 
stripLeadingDashes(String) - Static method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Strips leading dashes from a flag token.
sweepCommas(String) - Static method in class cli.LexicalCommandProcessor
Using regex to collapse multiple commas into one and removes leading/trailing commas from the merged argument.
